claims.statement: Victoria Falls height is at least 6× larger than Kola Superdeep Borehole depth.
claims.explanation: Sources: USGS/NOAA/CTBUH/UNESCO and other references. Victoria Falls height: 108 m. Kola Superdeep Borehole depth: 12262 m.

claims.statement: Shanghai Maglev top speed is slower than Cheetah sprint.
claims.explanation: Sources: NOAA/engineering references (values rounded). Shanghai Maglev top speed: 431 km/h. Cheetah sprint: 120 km/h.

claims.statement: Panama Canal length is at least 7× longer than Great Barrier Reef length.
claims.explanation: Sources: UNESCO/Britannica/national agencies (values rounded). Panama Canal length: 82 km. Great Barrier Reef length: 2300 km.

claims.statement: There are fewer grams in a kilogram than bits in a byte.
claims.explanation: Sources: standards & reference values. 1,000 g vs 8 bits.

claims.statement: First SMS sent happened after Penicillin discovered.
claims.explanation: Sources: widely documented dates. First SMS sent: 1992. Penicillin discovered: 1928.
